info.title: Softmax Technologies — Central API
info.description: Central platform API for tenant lifecycle, billing, and administration.

post.summary: Register a new user account

message.const: Registration successful. Please verify your email with the OTP sent.

post.summary: Authenticate a user and generate a token
Request a password reset OTP
Verify an OTP for email verification or password reset

message.const: OTP verified. You may now reset your password.

post.summary: Resend the email verification OTP
Reset the user's password using a valid token or OTP

message.const: Password reset successfully. Please login with your new password.

post.summary: Log the user out (Invalidate the token)
Change the password for the currently authenticated user
Create a new plan

get.summary: List available plan feature modules and limit keys for plan builders

post.summary: Subscribe a tenant to a plan
Cancel a subscription

get.summary: Check active subscription status for a tenant

get.description: Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination via query parameters.
get.summary: Display a listing of all tenants

post.description:
Creates tenant record, provisions database, runs migrations,
seeds default settings, creates admin user, and sends welcome emails.
post.summary: Store a newly created tenant

delete.description: Permanently deletes tenant and associated data.

post.description: Prevents tenant access while preserving all data.
post.summary: Suspend the specified tenant
Activate a previously suspended tenant

get.description: Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination via query parameters.
get.summary: Display a listing of all users

post.description:
Creates user with optional role and direct permissions.
Sends welcome notification with login details.
post.summary: Store a newly created user

get.description: Includes roles, direct permissions, and effective permissions.

put.description: Supports partial updates with optional role sync and permission sync.

patch.description: Supports partial updates with optional role sync and permission sync.

delete.description: Soft deletes user and revokes all roles and permissions.

get.description: Shows role permissions, direct permissions, and combined effective permissions.

post.description: Activates or deactivates a user account.
post.summary: Toggle the user active status

post.description: Replaces any existing roles with the new one.
post.summary: Assign a role to the user
Assign direct permissions to the user

post.description: Removes specific direct permissions while keeping role permissions.
post.summary: Revoke direct permissions from the user

post.description: Replaces all direct permissions with the provided list.
post.summary: Sync direct permissions for the user

AssignPermissionsRequest.description:
Class AssignPermissionsRequest

Validates direct permission assignments to users.

permissions.description: List of permission names to assign.

AssignPermissionsRequest.title: AssignPermissionsRequest

AssignRoleRequest.description:
Class AssignRoleRequest

Validates role assignment to users.
AssignRoleRequest.title: AssignRoleRequest

ChangePasswordRequest.description:
Class ChangePasswordRequest

Validates authenticated password change.
ChangePasswordRequest.title: ChangePasswordRequest

CreatePlanRequest.description:
Class CreatePlanRequest

Validates data for creating a new subscription plan.

is_active.description: Whether the plan is available for subscription.

features.description: List of features included in the plan.

CreatePlanRequest.title: CreatePlanRequest

CreateSubscriptionRequest.description:
Class CreateSubscriptionRequest

Validates subscription creation with payment processing.

payment_gateway.description: The payment gateway to process the transaction.

CreateSubscriptionRequest.title: CreateSubscriptionRequest

CreateTenantRequest.description:
Class CreateTenantRequest

Validates tenant onboarding with admin user creation.

admin_email.description: The admin user's email for login.

admin_password.description: The admin user's password (auto-generated if null).

CreateTenantRequest.title: CreateTenantRequest

CreateUserRequest.description:
Class CreateUserRequest

Validates central platform user creation data.
Supports role assignment and direct permissions.

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active.

permissions.description: Direct permissions to assign beyond role permissions.

CreateUserRequest.title: CreateUserRequest

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary domain for the tenant.

ResetPasswordRequest.description:
Class ResetPasswordRequest

Validates password reset with OTP.

reset_token.description: Token from verify-otp (password_reset). Use this after verify-otp, or send otp instead for a one-step reset.

otp.description: OTP from forgot-password email. Alternative to reset_token when skipping verify-otp.

ResetPasswordRequest.title: ResetPasswordRequest

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active.
